name: Flux.2 inpainting — paint a mask + prompt
description:
Replace part of an image with a text prompt. Upload the picture you want to change, paint over the area to replace, and type what should appear there — Flux.2 Klein regenerates only the painted region from your prompt and blends it back into the original.

• **Paint the mask**: brush over the region you want the model to redo. Only the painted area changes; everything else is kept.
• **What to put there**: a short description of what should fill the masked area (e.g. "a pair of sunglasses", "a bunch of flowers").

Runs fast (4-step distilled Klein model). To bring in a look or object from a second picture, use the version with a reference image instead.
author: Template - ComfyUI

exposedParameters.label: Image to edit — paint the area to replace
What to put in the masked area
